title: Change Status Schema
description: Machine-readable lifecycle and traceability state for a RuneContext change. Schema version 1.

schema_version.description: Schema version. Unknown versions must fail closed.

status.description: Lifecycle status. Superseded changes must include `superseded_by`; cross-file bidirectional consistency is enforced by project-level validation, not by this single-file schema.

type.description: Work type. Base enum: project, feature, bug, standard, chore. Custom types use x- prefix.

context_bundles.description: Selected or resolved context bundle IDs.

related_specs.description: Paths to specs touched or informed by this change.

related_decisions.description: Paths to decisions touched or informed by this change.

related_changes.description: Non-hierarchical links to other relevant changes.

depends_on.description: Changes that must land first or whose outputs are assumed.

informed_by.description: Earlier changes whose reasoning or outputs influenced this one.

superseded_by.description: Changes that replace this one. Required when `status` is `superseded`.

verification_status.description: Verification outcome: pending (not verified), passed, failed, or skipped with justification.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 date when the change was created.

closed_at.description: ISO 8601 date when the change was closed, or null if still open.

promotion_assessment.description: Structured promotion assessment state and suggested targets.

target_path.description: Path to the target spec, standard, or decision.

summary.description: Summary of what durable knowledge should be promoted.

suggested_targets.description: Suggested promotion targets with durable knowledge to promote.

extensions.description: Optional extensions. Allowed only when project-level validation observes `allow_extensions: true` in `runecontext.yaml`. Non-authoritative; cannot affect lifecycle.
